name: Hurry Tuna, Please
recipeIngredient: 1 Large (12-1/2 ounce) can white or light meat tuna, drained
1/2 cup chicken bouillon (made from one cube dissolved in one cup of water)
1 package egg noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the apple and onion in a little oil until lightly cooked.
2. Add flour and stir slowly into the mixture with milk and bouillon to create a lumpy white sauce (the lumps are from the apple and onions).
3. Add tuna, breaking it up as you go, and sprinkle in the curry. Mix well.
4. Serve over hot noodles that take nine minutes to cook or cooked rice.
